messages.tinyGears: Turning it off and on again...

meta.title: AI career guidance for students
meta.description: CareerLens connects strengths, aspirations, and market signals into an actionable career roadmap.

hero.description: Turn strengths, aspirations, and career signals into a roadmap you can act on.
hero.imageAlt: A group of students talking together on campus

preview.title: Career agent
preview.searching: Finding skills and career signals that match your profile
preview.result: Three directions to compare and test

intelligence.title: One profile. Three layers of insight.
intelligence.description: CareerLens does not lock you into a single test. It connects personal signals, real progress, and a changing world of work.

profile.title: Understand yourself
profile.description: Combine strengths, interests, learning style, and real constraints instead of relying on one personality label.

growth.title: See your progress
growth.description: Keep milestones, projects, and decisions across years so every session begins with your real journey.

market.title: Read the market
market.description: Compare your profile with careers, skills, job signals, and global developments backed by visible sources.

assessment.title: Assess to understand, never to judge.
assessment.description: Objective scenarios help reveal academic strengths, motivation, and social skills that deserve closer observation.

preview.question: When a group project falls behind, where do you usually begin?

options.two: Clarify the issue and reset responsibilities
options.three: Wait for the group leader to decide

preview.note: Results begin a conversation and real-world experiments. They are never a fixed verdict.

journey.title: Stay supported through every change of direction.
journey.description: Each milestone adds new evidence so AI can adapt its guidance instead of holding you to your first choice.

explore.title: Explore
explore.description: Notice strengths, try different environments, and narrow the career areas worth investigating.

learn.title: Build foundations
learn.description: Choose subjects, projects, and skills that create evidence for the direction you are considering.

experience.title: Test assumptions
experience.description: Compare expectations with real work, real feedback, and real hiring requirements.

grow.title: Keep growing
grow.description: Update your goal, skill gaps, and next move using the outcomes you have already created.

roadmap.title: Know which skill should come first.
roadmap.description: AI turns skill gaps into clear priorities, milestones, and evidence you can use to test your progress.

skills.foundation: Foundational skills for your chosen direction
skills.project: Practice through projects with tangible outcomes

priority.label: Skill priority
priority.title: A sequence for growth
priority.note: Priorities adapt when your profile, goals, or the market changes.

paths.title: Three paths to test
paths.description: Compare fit, learning cost, and proof to build before committing.

adaptive.title: A roadmap that adapts
adaptive.description: Every check-in is a chance to adjust your goal without starting over.

market.title: Read the market while the world keeps moving.
market.description: An agent searches the web in real time, cross-checks sources, and combines background monitoring to detect new signals.

agent.title: Market intelligence agent
agent.query: Which skills are appearing more often in entry-level roles?

forecast.label: 3-5 year scenarios
forecast.title: An outlook, not a prophecy
forecast.description: Every signal includes its scope, time horizon, sources, and confidence level.

growing.title: Growing signal
growing.description: Independent sources point in the same direction.

stable.title: Stable signal
stable.description: Demand exists without a clear shift yet.

uncertain.title: Not enough evidence
uncertain.description: AI says when the available data cannot support a conclusion.

forecast.note: CareerLens separates observed, estimated, and forecast data. It never invents an accuracy percentage.

cv.imageAlt: A group of students working together around a table
cv.title: Turn what you have done into a stronger CV.
cv.description: AI helps structure your story, find vague claims, and compare your CV with the opportunity you are pursuing.

review.title: CV review assistant
review.status: Reading in the context of the role

evidence.title: Add evidence
evidence.description: Clarify what you owned, what you produced, and what you learned.

clarity.title: Make the impact clear
clarity.description: Replace generic descriptions with outcomes that can be verified.

match.title: Match the opportunity
match.description: Prioritise relevant experience without stuffing keywords.

trust.title: Responsible AI should show you why.
trust.description: Every recommendation should trace back to evidence, limitations, and the learner's right to decide.

citations.title: Sources you can open
citations.description: Market, career, and skill claims include a URL, publication date, and retrieval time.

privacy.title: Privacy from the start
privacy.description: Unnecessary sensitive information is removed before a payload is sent to the model.

explain.title: Guidance with reasons
explain.description: See the strengths, skill gaps, and evidence behind every suggested direction.

autonomy.title: Learners stay in control
autonomy.description: CareerLens suggests paths to test. It never chooses your future for you.

scope.title: Current scope
scope.description: AI chat and the three-path roadmap work today as a POC. Long-term assessment, CV review, and realtime web data are part of the product vision now being built.

faq.title: What to know before you begin.
faq.description: CareerLens is a tool for reflection and experimentation, not a machine that scores your future.

one.question: Will CareerLens choose a career for me?
one.answer: No. It gives you directions to compare, questions to test, and practical next steps. The final decision always remains yours.

two.question: Is market information always realtime?
two.answer: The product vision combines on-demand web research with scheduled background monitoring. Every result will show its source, publication date, and retrieval time so you can judge freshness.

three.question: Does a test result permanently define my profile?
three.answer: No. A result is one signal in a growing profile. New experience, projects, and feedback can change how the system understands you.

four.question: Can I change direction after receiving a roadmap?
four.answer: Yes. The roadmap is designed to adapt to new goals, constraints, and evidence without forcing you to start again.

finalCta.title: Your future does not need a rushed answer.
finalCta.description: Start by understanding yourself, test one small direction, and let real evidence guide the next move.

login.title: Welcome back
login.description: Enter your details to continue to CareerLens.

signup.title: Create your account
signup.description: Complete the three short steps below to set up your profile.
signup.consent: I consent to CareerLens collecting, storing, and processing data related to my account, and I agree to the <terms>Terms of Service</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.

forgot.title: Recover your password
forgot.description: Enter your email and we’ll prepare the reset flow.

reset.title: Set a new password
reset.description: Choose and confirm the password you want to use next.

superadmin.title: Operations access
superadmin.description: This restricted sign-in requires the built-in credentials and a current authentication code.

Roadmap.title: Turn self-knowledge into a next step
Roadmap.description: Connect interests, experience, and real constraints with sample hiring signals from Vietnam.

brief.title: A decision brief, not a verdict
brief.description: CareerLens turns the information you share into three directions you can compare and test.

profile.title: Your profile
profile.description: Share your current foundation, interests, and constraints.

signals.title: Market signals
signals.description: Compare sample roles and skills by region.

plan.title: Three directions
plan.description: Compare skill gaps, roadmaps, and proof to build.

form.title: Profile for this analysis
form.description: The more specific your experience and constraints, the more useful the roadmap becomes.
form.foundationDescription: Region is used only to compare job opportunities and sample salary data.
form.targetRegion: Where you want to study or work
form.regionHint: Current list of 34 provinces and cities.
form.regionPlaceholder: Search for a province or city
form.regionEmpty: No matching province or city found.
form.strengthsDescription: Use real experiences. You do not need to write like a resume.
form.subject: Notable subject or skill
form.subjectPlaceholder: Example: maths, content writing, electrical repair
form.interestsHint: Separate items with commas, or add a suggestion based on your subject or skill.
form.activity: Activities or projects you have done
form.activityPlaceholder: Describe your role, what you did, and what felt interesting or difficult. You can leave this blank.
form.conditionsDescription: Set the time, budget, and environment that make a direction realistic.
form.weeklyHours: Hours available to learn each week
form.budgetPlaceholder: Example: under VND 20 million per year
form.constraintsPlaceholder: Example: need to study near home or work while studying. Optional.
form.constraintsHint: Do not include gender, religion, ethnicity, or unnecessary identifying information.
form.goalDescription: Share what you want the analysis to prioritise. You can leave this blank.
form.intent: What do you want to solve?
form.question: What do you want most?

form.consent: I agree to use the form data to create career guidance.
form.consentHint: AI provides suggestions for consideration and does not decide for the learner.
form.footerHint: Each run creates three explained options.

workEnvironment.hybrid: A mix of online and on-site

actions.success: Your roadmap is ready. Compare the options and open each roadmap below.

market.title: Sample market data
market.description: This POC does not use a production crawler. These figures describe the current seed only.

privacy.title: Privacy filtered first
privacy.description: Gender, hometown, ethnicity, and religion are not included in the payload sent to the model.

principles.title: How the analysis works
principles.profile: AI combines academic signals, interests, learning style, and market signals.
principles.roadmap: Each direction includes skill gaps and verifiable practice stages.
principles.market: Roles and salary signals come only from the market seed provided for this run.

wizard.title: Build a guidance roadmap
wizard.description: Review existing data, add context, and define the decision you want help with.

confirm.title: Confirm your Starting Point
confirm.description: Review the information available before using it to personalise your roadmap.
confirm.hint: If anything is incorrect, update your Starting Point and return here.
confirm.consent: I confirm the information above and agree to use it to create this roadmap.
confirm.consentHint: AI provides suggestions for consideration and does not decide for the learner.

foundation.title: Current foundation
foundation.description: Add your education level, location, languages, and notable abilities.
foundation.hint: These answers complement your saved transcript and experience.

interests.title: Interests and topics
interests.description: Share topics you actively explore or want to spend more time learning.
interests.hint: You can enter multiple topics separated by commas.

conditions.title: Learning and work conditions
conditions.description: Set realistic time, budget, learning style, and work environment preferences.
conditions.hint: Include only constraints that directly affect education or work decisions.

goal.title: Goal for this session
goal.description: Describe the decision or problem this roadmap should help you address.
goal.hint: You do not need to choose a career or major first. Focus on the question you need answered.

saved.listDescription: Choose a roadmap to review or continue editing.

startingPoint.title: Starting Point information
startingPoint.description: Your saved information has been integrated into this analysis in a concise format.
startingPoint.emptyDescription: You can still continue and provide information in the following steps.

results.title: Three directions to test
results.description: Compare fit, skill gaps, and the investment required before choosing.
results.noStrengths: There is not enough data to conclude yet.
results.noInterests: There are no clear personal signals yet.

results.otherDirectionsDescription: Change the selected direction if another option fits better after comparison.
results.matchedTitle: Why this direction is worth trying
results.roadmapDiagramDescription: Select each stage in the diagram to review its goals, tasks, and completion evidence.
results.followUpDescription: Answer these to narrow the skill gap and cost.
results.autonomy: You can choose, test again, or change direction after further validation.

fullTime.roles: Roles and how to evaluate an offer
fullTime.promotion: Path toward a more senior role

Journey.title: The way to myself
Journey.description: Turn plans into finishable steps, see your progress, and keep growing into a life that feels like your own.
Journey.yearNavigation: Choose a year on your journey
Journey.imported: Added {count} new milestones from the roadmap. Your existing journal stayed unchanged.
Journey.importFailed: No matching roadmap was found to add.
Journey.entryDescription: Change the content or timing whenever your plan needs to match real life more closely.
Journey.deleteDescription: {title} will be permanently removed from your journey. This action cannot be undone.

fields.title: What you want to do
fields.descriptionHint: Describe the result you want to see or how you will know it is complete.

empty.title: Your first page is waiting
empty.description: Add something you want to do, or apply an AI roadmap to begin this journey.

reflection.label: A note from AI
reflection.empty: You do not need to see the whole path before you begin. One honest milestone is enough.
reflection.progress: You kept a promise to yourself in {completed} of {total} milestones. That is real progress.
reflection.next: Your nearest step is {title}. Make it small enough to begin today.
reflection.complete: You completed every milestone currently here. Take a moment to notice it, then choose what comes next.
reflection.identity: Every completed step is evidence of the person you are becoming

future.label: Your next 3 months
future.empty: Add a near-term milestone and give the future a clearer shape

ai.title: Edit the journey with AI
ai.description: Describe what should change. AI can move dates, rewrite, add, or delete milestones when you make a clear request.
ai.name: Journey AI
ai.welcome: What would you like to adjust? For example: Move certificate goals to October, split CV preparation into smaller steps, or delete a milestone that no longer fits.
ai.hint: Enter to send, Shift + Enter for a new line
ai.error: AI cannot edit the journey right now. Try again, or edit each milestone directly.

StartingPoint.title: Starting Point

PersonalityTest.title: Personality test
PersonalityTest.description: Explore how you recharge, take in information, make decisions, and organize daily life.

intro.title: Understand yourself through 12 questions
intro.description: Choose the option that sounds most like you in everyday situations. There are no right or wrong answers.
intro.timeDescription: A short test focused on familiar choices from daily life.
intro.answerDescription: Choose what you usually do, not what you think you should do.
intro.note: Your result reflects current preferences and does not replace a professional psychological assessment.

question.guidance: Choose the option that is closer to you.

result.title: Your result is ready
result.description: These four letters summarize the preferences shown in your answers.
result.noteTitle: Use this result as a starting point
result.note: Personality can shift across contexts and experiences. You can retake the test when the result no longer feels right.

E.title: Extraversion
E.description: You often recharge through interaction and like to develop ideas by talking with others.

I.title: Introversion
I.description: You often recharge in private and prefer to reflect before sharing your thoughts.

S.title: Sensing
S.description: You notice concrete facts, direct experience, and information you can apply right away.

N.title: Intuition
N.description: You readily notice patterns, future possibilities, and meaning behind information.

T.title: Thinking
T.description: You often prioritize consistency, evidence, and principles when making decisions.

F.title: Feeling
F.description: You often consider personal values, individual needs, and the human impact of decisions.

J.title: Judging
J.description: You feel more comfortable with plans, clear milestones, and work completed on schedule.

P.title: Perceiving
P.description: You prefer to keep options open, explore as you go, and adjust to the situation.

0.prompt: After a busy week, what helps you recharge more?
0.a: Meeting friends or joining an activity with plenty of people
0.b: Spending quiet time alone or with a few people close to me

1.prompt: When you enter a completely new group, what do you usually do?
1.a: Start conversations and get to know several people
1.b: Observe first, then connect with a few people who feel right

2.prompt: When an idea is still taking shape, how do you prefer to work through it?
2.a: Talk it through with others until it becomes clearer
2.b: Think it through privately before sharing it

3.prompt: When learning a new subject, which starting point helps you more?
3.a: Seeing a concrete example and trying it step by step
3.b: Understanding the big picture and possible directions first

4.prompt: Which kind of information do you tend to trust more?
4.a: Clear facts and details that can be verified
4.b: Patterns and meaning that emerge across several sources

5.prompt: How would you rather receive instructions for a new task?
5.a: With a clear process and specific criteria to follow
5.b: With an overall goal and room to discover my own approach

6.prompt: When making a difficult decision, what do you usually prioritize?
6.a: The choice that best fits the evidence and consistent principles
6.b: The choice that best fits my values and its effect on people

7.prompt: When giving feedback to someone who is struggling, what do you do first?
7.a: Analyze the issue and state a practical solution directly
7.b: Listen to their feelings and phrase feedback with care

8.prompt: During a disagreement, what matters more to you?
8.a: Finding a fair solution based on the same standard for everyone
8.b: Preserving the relationship and considering individual needs

9.prompt: When starting a long project, which approach feels more natural?
9.a: Plan the work, set milestones, and track progress
9.b: Begin, explore, and adjust the plan as I learn

10.prompt: What kind of preparation makes a trip feel more comfortable?
10.a: A schedule with the main choices settled in advance
10.b: A few anchor points with freedom to change plans

11.prompt: When an important deadline is approaching, which rhythm sounds more like you?
11.a: Create structure early and complete each part according to plan
11.b: Stay flexible and accelerate once I have enough information

actions.saved: Your result has been saved to your profile.
actions.failed: Something went wrong while saving. Please try again.
actions.unavailable: This account cannot save a personality test result.

Settings.title: Settings
Settings.description: Manage how AI features work for your account.

career.title: Roadmap analysis
career.description: This model is used automatically when creating or updating a roadmap.
career.modelHint: Change the model here instead of selecting it during every guidance session.
career.footerHint: Changes apply to future roadmap generations.

roadmapData.title: Roadmap data
roadmapData.description: Choose how information is prefilled when you build a new roadmap.
roadmapData.reuseLabel: Use data from the latest roadmap
roadmapData.reuseHint: When creating a new roadmap, the system prefills every answer and selection from the latest one. You can still edit each field before generating.
roadmapData.footerHint: This setting does not change data stored with existing roadmaps.
roadmapData.resetDescription: Start the next roadmap with a fresh form.
roadmapData.resetHint: This only clears the current prefill source. Saved roadmaps and the data used to edit each roadmap are not deleted.
roadmapData.resetFooterHint: After refreshing, the first new roadmap will not reuse data from older roadmaps.

actions.userOnly: This setting is available only for learner accounts.
